title: Impacket wmiexec Remote Command Execution
description: Detects impacket wmiexec-style remote execution, where commands run via WMI (Win32_Process Create) with output redirected to a local admin share, e.g. 'cmd.exe /Q /c <cmd> 1> \\127.0.0.1\ADMIN$\__<ts> 2>&1'. A classic semi-interactive lateral-movement pattern.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( ('Parent Process Name' like '*WmiPrvSE.exe') and (('Command Line' like '*1>*' or 'Command Line' like '*2>&1*' or 'Command Line' like '*1>*')) ) or (('Command Line' like '*cmd.exe*' and 'Command Line' like '*ADMIN$*')))
